OPER-REVIEW-01.consequence: Per-query responses remain visible to modeling and classification; query-order collapse and equal-contrast/different-raw-response attacks downgrade or remain distinguishable.
OPER-REVIEW-01.mechanism: query_A, query_B, query_A_then_B, and query_B_then_A remain separate observations with raw change-to-dirty responses modeled directly.
OPER-REVIEW-01.minimal_repair: Preserved raw per-query observations and kept matched contrasts as derived quantities for lifetime and sign-law analysis.
OPER-REVIEW-01.required_regression: Operator self-test retains query/order collapse downgrades and equal-contrast/different-raw-response regressions.

OPER-REVIEW-02.consequence: Held-out prediction cannot be rescued by seeing the same replicate, mapping, or delay level in training.
OPER-REVIEW-02.mechanism: Strict replicate, mapping, and delay holdouts exclude the tested factor level from training.
OPER-REVIEW-02.minimal_repair: Held out replicate 1, mapping map1, and delay 10ms as absent factor levels.
OPER-REVIEW-02.required_regression: Mapping-scrambled, delay-scrambled, and in-sample-rescue fixtures cannot pass the strict holdout gate.

OPER-REVIEW-03.consequence: Observed status is downgraded unless held-out classification actually passes the predeclared threshold.
OPER-REVIEW-03.mechanism: Nearest-centroid-by-q held-out classifier computes a 7x7 confusion matrix and balanced accuracy against a fixed 0.95 threshold.
OPER-REVIEW-03.minimal_repair: Replaced asserted classification with computed held-out classifier output and hard fail-closed gate.
OPER-REVIEW-03.required_regression: Perfect separation passes; confused, class-imbalanced trivial, and training-memorized held-out-failure attacks fail.

OPER-REVIEW-04.consequence: Variation-confounded, form-changing, or nonmonotonic packets downgrade instead of supporting observed status.
OPER-REVIEW-04.mechanism: Lifetime analysis emits the complete five-class vocabulary and session, mapping, query, confidence, and polarity gates.
OPER-REVIEW-04.minimal_repair: Added full lifetime vocabulary, mean persistence curve, variation summaries, confidence intervals, and hard downgrade gates.
OPER-REVIEW-04.required_regression: Stable persistence, bounded decay, immediate-only, no-response, nonmonotonic form change, session/mapping/query confounds, crossover, sign reversal, and opposite-sign replicate fixtures pass or downgrade as expected.
